text: Our safety board reviews hazard logs quarterly and escalates residual exposure findings to senior management for formal acceptance or corrective action.
adversarial_note: Sounds like record_keeping due to 'reviews logs'; the semantic focus is residual risk acceptance

text: We model all plausible failure cascades before system sign-off and document treatment options with cost-benefit analysis for each identified scenario.
adversarial_note: Near technical_documentation — 'document treatment options' could confuse classifier

text: Foreseeable harm scenarios are catalogued in our scenario library with probability ratings and severity scores assigned through a structured expert elicitation process.
adversarial_note: Near security — 'harm scenarios' and 'probability ratings' overlap with threat modelling

text: Das Risikoregister erfasst alle identifizierten Bedrohungen mit Eintrittswahrscheinlichkeit, Auswirkung und verantwortlicher Person für jede Maßnahme.
adversarial_note: German; near record_keeping — 'Risikoregister' is a register (log-like artefact)

text: Lifecycle checkpoints require a fresh hazard analysis whenever the model's training data, deployment context, or intended use population changes substantially.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — 'checkpoints' implies logging; near technical_documentation — change management

text: Severity-weighted scoring determines whether the identified risk exposure is tolerable or mandates further mitigation measures before sign-off can be granted.
adversarial_note: Near security — 'scoring' and 'exposure' used in security contexts too

text: Our ground-truth annotation team resolves labelling disputes through a majority-vote adjudication process, with all disagreements and final decisions recorded in the annotation management tool.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — 'recorded in the tool' sounds like logging

text: We hold out 20% of the labelled corpus as an untouched blind test split, managed by a separate team who are barred from participating in any training or validation experiment.
adversarial_note: Near technical_documentation — test-split protocol is partly a design decision

text: Protected demographic attributes are masked in production feature vectors but preserved in a restricted bias-validation partition with access limited to the fairness evaluation team.
adversarial_note: Near security — access restriction and masking are security-sounding controls

text: Trainingsdatensätze werden vor jeder neuen Modellversion auf Vollständigkeit, Klassenungleichgewicht und systematische Fehler geprüft und das Prüfergebnis dokumentiert.
adversarial_note: German; near record_keeping — 'Prüfergebnis dokumentiert' is documentation of results

text: Every external dataset is screened for licence compatibility and data-subject rights compliance before ingestion; non-conforming datasets are quarantined and their rejection documented.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — rejection documentation; near security — quarantine language

text: Upstream source metadata is tracked so we can trace any training example back to its original collection file, collection timestamp, and the human annotator who labelled it.
adversarial_note: HARD: could be mistaken for record_keeping — tracing, timestamps, annotator ID all sound like audit logs

text: The engineering passport captures every hyperparameter choice, framework version, hardware target, and environment hash for each production build of the AI system.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — 'captures every' sounds like logging

text: We publish an AI fact sheet that explains what the system does, how it was trained, what it cannot do, and the conditions under which it should not be relied upon.
adversarial_note: Near transparency — limitation and scope disclosure overlaps Art. 13

text: Architecture decision records are maintained alongside the source code repository to explain why each major component or algorithm was selected over evaluated alternatives.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — 'records maintained alongside' sounds like audit trail

text: Die technische Akte beschreibt Modellarchitektur, Eingabedaten, Validierungsschritte und enthält alle wesentlichen Entwurfsentscheidungen mit schriftlicher Begründung.
adversarial_note: German; near data_governance — 'Eingabedaten' overlaps data documentation

text: Our submission to the notified body includes detailed block diagrams, data flow schematics, and a traceability matrix mapping each Annex IV requirement to the relevant dossier section.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — 'traceability matrix' sounds like an audit artefact

text: We document accuracy floors and known failure modes in the model card before handing the system to the deployer so they can set appropriate use restrictions.
paraphrase_of: capability and limitation disclosure in technical docs
adversarial_note: HARD: near transparency — limitation disclosure also required under Art. 13 IFU

text: Every prediction the system makes is written to an append-only log with the raw input hash, predicted class, probability distribution, model version tag, and wall-clock timestamp.
adversarial_note: Near security — 'append-only', 'hash' are security-sounding properties

text: Logs are cryptographically signed at write time so that any retrospective tampering is detectable during a regulatory audit or post-incident forensic review.
adversarial_note: Near security — cryptographic signing is a security control

text: We retain decision records for five years following the last interaction, after which they are securely erased using certified media-sanitisation procedures.
adversarial_note: Near data_governance — data lifecycle and deletion overlaps GDPR obligations

text: Aufzeichnungen aller KI-gestützten Entscheidungen werden unveränderlich mit Zeitstempel im SIEM archiviert und sind für die Aufsichtsbehörde auf Anfrage zugänglich.
adversarial_note: German; near security — SIEM is a security tool

text: Each time a human reviewer overturns an AI recommendation the system writes an override event capturing the original AI output, the reviewer's decision, the stated reason, and the reviewer's ID.
adversarial_note: HARD: near human_oversight — override logging sits at the boundary of Art. 12 and Art. 14

text: Post-incident forensics can replay the exact input sequence that led to a disputed decision because our event sourcing log stores the full feature vector alongside the model state at inference time.
adversarial_note: Near risk_management — post-incident review language; near technical_documentation — model state

text: Customers who receive a negative automated credit decision are sent a plain-language letter within five working days naming the main factors in non-technical terms and explaining how to appeal.
paraphrase_of: transparency to affected persons — credit decline
adversarial_note: Near human_oversight — the appeal path overlaps oversight

text: Our product interface shows a small badge and tooltip on every AI-generated recommendation so users can immediately identify which outputs were produced by an automated system.
adversarial_note: Near human_oversight — in-UI disclosure can be confused with oversight interface elements

text: The operator handbook dedicates two sections to explaining how the scoring model was trained, which features it uses, and what its validated accuracy range is under different operating conditions.
adversarial_note: HARD: near technical_documentation — IFU content mirrors technical file content

text: Wir informieren Nutzerinnen und Nutzer vor jeder KI-gestützten Entscheidung darüber, dass ein automatisiertes System eingesetzt wird, und nennen den Anbieter des Systems.
adversarial_note: German; near human_oversight — notification before decision

text: Applicants can request a detailed breakdown of which features drove the system's output in their case and receive a written response within 30 days.
adversarial_note: Near human_oversight — right to request human review often co-located with explanation right

text: Our public AI inventory lists every deployed high-risk model with its intended use, risk tier, provider contact, conformity date, and a summary of the training data used.
adversarial_note: Near technical_documentation — public-register content overlaps technical file summary

text: A qualified analyst must countersign every AI-generated fraud alert before an account is frozen, and the countersignature is recorded with a timestamp and the analyst's employee number.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — the countersignature record is a log entry

text: When the model's confidence drops below 0.65, the case is automatically routed to a second-tier human reviewer who must resolve it within four business hours before it can proceed.
adversarial_note: Near security — confidence thresholding is also used in robustness monitoring

text: Team leads hold the authority to immediately disable the AI processing queue and revert to manual case handling if they observe a cluster of anomalous or inconsistent AI outputs.
adversarial_note: Near security — anomaly detection framing; near risk_management — escalation

text: Menschliche Prüfer müssen jeden KI-Befund in Hochrisikosituationen aktiv bestätigen, bevor eine Maßnahme ergriffen wird, und ihre Entscheidung mit Begründung im System vermerken.
adversarial_note: German; near record_keeping — 'im System vermerken' is logging

text: Monthly oversight reports track how often reviewers accepted, modified, or rejected AI outputs and flag any analyst whose override rate is an outlier compared to peers.
adversarial_note: Near record_keeping — tracking and reporting sounds like audit logging

text: All staff who use the AI triage tool must complete a certified two-day training covering model limitations, confidence score interpretation, and mandatory escalation scenarios before being granted access.
adversarial_note: Near security — access control framing; near transparency — limitation interpretation

text: We run the model through a quarterly red-team exercise where an internal adversarial group attempts to cause systematic misclassifications using carefully crafted boundary-case inputs.
adversarial_note: HARD: near risk_management — red-team is also a risk-management practice

text: Per-class accuracy is continuously streamed to a dashboard that pages on-call engineers if any class drops more than two percentage points below its 90-day rolling baseline.
adversarial_note: Near human_oversight — on-call paging resembles alert escalation

text: Model weights and inference endpoints are access-gated behind a secrets vault with mandatory rotation every 90 days and alerts for any access outside approved service accounts.
adversarial_note: HARD: near data_governance — 'access-gated' resembles data access controls

text: Sicherheitsprüfungen nach ISO 27001 und OWASP ML Security Top 10 werden vor jeder Produktionsfreigabe des KI-Systems durch unabhängige Gutachter durchgeführt.
adversarial_note: German; near risk_management — 'Sicherheitsprüfungen vor Freigabe' mirrors sign-off language

text: Stress testing exposes the system to deliberately corrupted inputs at ten times normal volume to verify that it degrades gracefully and does not produce dangerous edge-case outputs.
paraphrase_of: resilience testing under load and corruption
adversarial_note: Near risk_management — testing for failure modes under stress

text: An independent penetration tester probes the model API for injection vulnerabilities, data-leakage paths, and model-inversion attack surfaces on an annual basis, with findings tracked to closure.
adversarial_note: Near risk_management — vulnerability findings tracked to closure resembles risk treatment
